creator: dwm@caimis.com
text:
Note that currently we set PREFIX to /usr/local/Xerces-1.3.0

I'd rather not do this, but the installation layout from apache doesn't
match BSD (or GNU) practice.

If we want to tweak to use the default PREFIX, we could put move the
dom, framework, internal, parsers, sax, sax2, util and validators
subdirectories under ${PREFIX}/include, assuming they won't walk on
another port.

Daniel
~~~~~~
